mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, C.FILE_ID, C.REF_ID, C.REF_TYPE, C.FILE_NAME, C.FILE_PATH, C.SAVE_NAME, C.FILE_TYPE, C.UPLOAD_DATE, C.DEL_YN FROM ( SELECT IM.*, AD.RISK_SCORE, AD.RISK_COMMENT, AD.CHECK_DATE, AD.DOC_COMMENT
,AD.CHECK_ID ,AD.RISK_RESULT ,AD.DOC_SCORE
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY IM.IMPORT_NUMBER ORDER BY AD.CHECK_DATE DESC) as RN FROM IMPORT_MASTER IM INNER JOIN AI_DOC_CHECK AD ON IM.IMPORT_NUMBER = AD.DOC_NUMBER WHERE IM.IMPORT_ID = #{importId} ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTACHMENTS C ON (A.IMPORT_NUMBER = C.REF_ID) WHERE A.RN = 1 AND C.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT IM.* FROM IMPORT_MASTER IM WHERE IM.IMPORT_ID = #{importId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.SUBMIT_DATE DESC) AS RNUM, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL_COUNT, CEIL(COUNT(*) OVER() / #{cri.amount}) AS TOTAL_PAGE, A.*, S.MEM_NAME AS SHIPPER_NAME, C.MEM_NAME AS OFFICER_NAME
, B.RISK_SCORE, B.RISK_RESULT, B.RISK_COMMENT, B.DOC_SCORE, B.DOC_COMMENT, B.CHECK_DATE
FROM IMPORT_MASTER A
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DOC_NUMBER, RISK_SCORE, RISK_RESULT, RISK_COMMENT, DOC_SCORE, DOC_COMMENT, CHECK_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY DOC_NUMBER ORDER BY CHECK_DATE DESC) AS IDX FROM AI_DOC_CHECK ) B ON A.IMPORT_NUMBER = B.DOC_NUMBER AND B.IDX = 1
LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER S ON A.MEM_ID = S.MEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER C ON A.OFFICER_ID = C.MEM_ID
AND A.MEM_ID = #{memId}
AND A.OFFICER_ID = #{memId}
AND 1=1
1=2
AND A.SUBMIT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{cri.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.SUBMIT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{cri.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND A.ITEM_NAME_DECLARED LIKE '%' || #{cri.keyword} || '%'
AND A.ORIGIN_CODE LIKE '%' || #{cri.keyword} || '%'
AND A.IMPORT_NUMBER LIKE '%' || #{cri.keyword} || '%'
AND A.STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'REVIEWING') AND (A.OFFICER_ID IS NULL OR A.DELAY_YN = 'Y')
AND A.STATUS = #{status}
) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{cri.startRow} AND #{cri.endRow}
mapper.update: UPDATE IMPORT_MASTER SET STATUS = #{status}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE IMPORT_NUMBER = #{importNumber}

UPDATE IMPORT_MASTER
SET MEM_ID = #{memId}, IMPORTER_NAME = #{importerName}, REP_NAME = #{repName}, TEL_NO = #{telNo}, EMAIL = #{email}, BIZ_REG_NO = #{bizRegNo}, CUSTOMS_ID = #{customsId}, ADDRESS = #{address}, OVERSEAS_BIZ_NAME = #{overseasBizName}, OVERSEAS_COUNTRY = #{overseasCountry}, IMPORT_TYPE = #{importType}, CARGO_MGMT_NO = #{cargoMgmtNo}, TRANS_MODE = #{transMode}, VESSEL_NAME = #{vesselName}, VESSEL_NATION = #{vesselNation}, ARRIVAL_EST_DATE = #{arrivalEstDate}, BONDED_IN_DATE = #{bondedInDate}, ORIGIN_COUNTRY = #{originCountry}, ARRIVAL_PORT = #{arrivalPort}, BL_NO = #{blNo}, AWB_NO = #{awbNo}, SUBMIT_DATE = #{submitDate}, CURRENCY_CODE = #{currencyCode}, PAY_AMOUNT = #{payAmount}, INVOICE_NO = #{invoiceNo}, INVOICE_DATE = #{invoiceDate}, CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo}, CONTRACT_DATE = #{contractDate}, PO_NO = #{poNo}, PO_DATE = #{poDate}, TOTAL_WEIGHT = #{totalWeight}, ORIGIN_CERT_YN = #{originCertYn}, INCOTERMS = #{incoterms}, FREIGHT_CURRENCY = #{freightCurrency}, FREIGHT_AMT = #{freightAmt}, INSURANCE_CURRENCY = #{insuranceCurrency}, INSURANCE_AMT = #{insuranceAmt}, ADD_AMT_CURRENCY = #{addAmtCurrency}, ADD_AMT = #{addAmt}, TOTAL_TAX_BASE = #{totalTaxBase}, TOTAL_DUTY = #{totalDuty}, TOTAL_VAT = #{totalVat}, TOTAL_TAX_SUM = #{totalTaxSum}, CONT_NO = #{contNo}, HS_CODE = #{hsCode}, TAX_TYPE = #{taxType}, TAX_BASE_TYPE = #{taxBaseType}, ITEM_NAME_DECLARED = #{itemNameDeclared}, ITEM_NAME_TRADE = #{itemNameTrade}, MODEL_NAME = #{modelName}, QTY = #{qty}, QTY_UNIT = #{qtyUnit}, UNIT_PRICE = #{unitPrice}, TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{totalAmount}, NET_WEIGHT = #{netWeight}, TAX_BASE_AMT_ITEM = #{taxBaseAmtItem}, ORIGIN_CODE = #{originCode}, ORIGIN_MARK_YN = #{originMarkYn}, STATUS = #{status}, IMPORT_NUMBER = #{importNumber}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, ASSIGN_DATE = #{assignDate} WHERE IMPORT_ID = #{importId}
mapper.select: SELECT M.MEM_ID FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.MEM_ROLE = 'OFFICER' ORDER BY ( -- 이 사람의 수입 일감 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER IM WHERE IM.OFFICER_ID = M.MEM_ID AND IM.STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'REVIEWING')) + -- 이 사람의 수출 일감 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER EM WHERE EM.OFFICER_ID = M.MEM_ID AND EM.STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'REVIEWING')) ) ASC, M.MEM_ID ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE IMPORT_MASTER SET OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, ASSIGN_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE IMPORT_NUMBER = #{importNumber}
UPDATE IMPORT_MASTER SET DELAY_YN = 'Y' WHERE STATUS != 'DELIVERED' AND SUBMIT_DATE <= SYSDATE - 3 AND (DELAY_YN = 'N' OR DELAY_YN IS NULL)
UPDATE IMPORT_MASTER SET OFFICER_ID = #{officerId}, ASSIGN_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE IMPORT_ID = #{importId}
mapper.select: SELECT M.MEM_ID AS "memId", M.MEM_NAME AS "memName", ( -- 수입 일감 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER IM WHERE IM.OFFICER_ID = M.MEM_ID AND IM.STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'REVIEWING')) + -- 수출 일감 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER EM WHERE EM.OFFICER_ID = M.MEM_ID AND EM.STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'REVIEWING')) ) AS "currentWorkload" FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.MEM_ROLE = 'OFFICER' ORDER BY "currentWorkload" ASC, M.MEM_ID ASC
